title: Automation of creating a status-related update

posts.author: ZivRaz (Ziv Raz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use occasionally the option of adding an “update” (manually) to a specific status, which is then denoted with a “peel off” sign.

I apply many automations which creates updates when a status is changed, but none of them actually relates to the specific status column (I have several status columns in my board), so the update is only “item related” rather than referring also to a specific column.

It would be great to automate an update which will be marked on the specific status which triggered it by the “peel off” sign.

Thanks
